name: Sniper Butterfly
overview: A captivating romance unfolds between a confident, cat-like woman and a bold, loyal younger man. As they navigate their differences, they find mutual healing and redemption, leading to a passionate, fate-driven love story full of tension and desire.

trailers.title: 《狙击蝴蝶 Sniper Butterfly》开播预告！全员上头，心跳失控预警
